special_mechanics.name: Crouch Super-Jump
special_mechanics.description: Higgins gained the ability to crouch, which can be followed up with a super-jump for increased vertical reach

special_mechanics.name: Skateboard
special_mechanics.description: Collectible item that allows Higgins to travel across the stage faster

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Choice between stone axe and boomerang; boomerang can be shot in four directions (up, down, left, right) while axe only goes left/right. Picking up same weapon consecutively allows up to 3 shots, then fireballs on 4th pickup

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Sources note 'slow movement' and 'limited jumping' as criticisms, but no precise physics values documented. Game removed dinosaur companions from Adventure Island II and run ability, instead adding crouch and super-jump mechanic.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Adventure Island
